# Radio  Free DeLand

A round-the-clock call-in radio show based in DeLand, Florida, offering listeners the opportunity to tune in and participate live at any hour. The show has a community-driven, accessible vibe rooted in local Florida culture, with an open-door format that invites audience engagement and real-time interaction.

Source: https://radio-free-deland-a3895ef3.zappy5.app

---

## Radio / Broadcasting — Radio  Free DeLand

On Air — 24 Hours a Day, 7 Days a Week




# Radio Free DeLand



### Your voice on the air — tune in and join the conversation live, any hour of the day or night from DeLand, Florida.





Call In Now



Listen Live






















Why Radio Free DeLand


## Broadcasting Your DeLand,Around the Clock


We keep the mic open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week — because real community radio / broadcasting doesn't punch out at midnight. Pick up the phone, tune in, and become part of the conversation.










### Always-On Broadcasting


The dial never goes dark. Whether it's 3 p.m. or 3 a.m., Radio Free DeLand is live — streaming signal through the Florida humidity so you're never broadcasting into silence.












### Live Listener Participation


Your voice belongs on air. Call in anytime — share a story, debate a topic, or just say hello to the night shift. Every caller gets a real moment on a real broadcast, not a voicemail box.












### Hyperlocal DeLand Voice


We're rooted right here in Volusia County. Local news, neighborhood stories, late-night companionship for night-shift workers and insomniacs alike — this is DeLand's own frequency, built by and for the community.












ON AIR 24/7








Call In Live



DeLand, FL


















Our Story

## DeLand After Dark


When the night goes quiet in Volusia County, Radio Free DeLand is still on the air — and someone is always there to pick up.









There's a particular stillness that settles over DeLand around 2 a.m. The orange groves go dark, the courthouse square empties out, and the Spanish moss stops swaying. But somewhere on the dial, a light stays on. Radio Free DeLand has been that light — a 24-hour call-in broadcast rooted in the rhythms of this community, running through every humid Florida night without pause.


It started simply enough: a belief that local voices deserve a live platform at any hour. Not a playlist. Not a bot. A real person, a live mic, and an open phone line. Whether you're a night-shift nurse heading home on US-17, a college student burning the midnight oil, or a retiree who just can't sleep — when you dial in, someone answers.





"Radio Free DeLand is a live front porch for this community — the kind of place where you can pull up a chair at any hour and find a familiar voice waiting."

— The Spirit of the Station



The callers are what make it real. Familiar voices that have been checking in for years. First-timers who stumble onto the frequency and can't believe someone picks up. Local musicians calling to share a new track. Neighbors talking through a storm warning. Listeners from across Florida — and beyond — who found something in this small-city broadcast that the big markets never quite offered: genuine, unscripted community radio.


This is broadcasting as it was always meant to feel — immediate, human, and alive. Tune in tonight. The porch light is on.

Hear the Full Story


































From the Community

## Voices on the Line


Real listeners, real nights — what keeps DeLand tuned in around the clock.












"I work the overnight shift at the warehouse. Radio Free DeLand is the only voice keeping me company at 3 a.m. It's not background noise — it feels like someone in town actually knows I'm awake."



Marcus T.
Listener since 2021 · DeLand, FL









"I called in once just to talk about my garden. They put me on the air, let me ramble about tomatoes for five minutes, and the host knew my neighborhood. That doesn't happen on any other radio / broadcasting show I've ever heard. It's genuinely ours."




"I've called in four more times since. They always pick up."


Darlene R.
Regular caller · Volusia County









"There's something about hearing a familiar local voice at midnight that makes this town feel smaller in the best way. No matter the hour, the line is open. That's rare and it means something."



Jerome & Patty W.
Longtime listeners · West DeLand





































On Air • 24 Hours • 7 Days a Week



## The Mic Is Open.Your Call Is Waiting.



Radio Free DeLand never sleeps. Whether it's midnight or high noon, tune in, dial up, and join the conversation already in progress. This is community broadcasting — live, unfiltered, and always on.





Call In Now



Listen Live

On The Air — 24 Hours a Day



# The Sound of DeLand,Around the Clock


Radio Free DeLand is a living, breathing broadcast — open lines, real voices, and the unscripted pulse of a Florida community tuning in at every hour of the day and night.


















## How the Format Works


Every hour on Radio Free DeLand sounds a little different — and that's exactly the point. The show runs continuously, welcoming callers from morning commutes, afternoon breaks, and the quiet stretch of the overnight. There's no script, no fixed roster of guests, only an open line and whoever picks up the phone.


Local news of the moment finds its way into the conversation naturally. A neighbor calls in about a road closure on New York Avenue. Someone else reflects on a story that's been on their mind all week. By 2 a.m. the tone shifts — slower, more reflective — the kind of radio that feels like a late-night drive through familiar streets.


This is community radio / broadcasting at its most direct: no gatekeeping, no editorial filter between the city and the microphone. DeLand speaks, and the signal carries it.


- Open lines, always — Call in any time, day or night

- Local news & conversation — DeLand stories, unfiltered

- Overnight & reflective hours — When the city quiets down

- 24/7 continuous broadcast — Never off the air









Studio B — DeLand, FL — Broadcasting Continuously



























On The Air — 24 Hours A Day


## Broadcast Rhythm


Radio Free DeLand never goes dark. Every hour of the day carries a different mood, a different voice — but the line is always open. Tune in, call in, become part of the signal.











12 AM – 6 AM
Overnight



### Overnight Voices


When DeLand goes quiet, the airwaves come alive. The overnight hours belong to the night owls, the insomniacs, and anyone who finds the world easier to talk about in the dark. Soft, unhurried conversation drifts across the dial — local stories, distant thoughts, and the kind of honesty that only comes after midnight. The phone lines are always open.














6 AM – Noon
Morning



### Sunrise Community Check-In


Florida mornings have a particular quality — warm light, humid air, and the feeling that the day could go anywhere. Our sunrise block is a community gathering point: local news, neighborhood voices, and the kind of conversation that makes a small city feel like a living room. Call in with what's on your mind before the day takes over.














Noon – 8 PM
Daytime



### Daytime Local Pulse


The heartbeat of Volusia County plays out in real time. Afternoons on Radio Free DeLand track the rhythm of everyday life — from downtown happenings to statewide conversations that ripple back to our corner of Florida. Lively, direct, and always tuned to what's actually happening, this is radio / broadcasting as it was meant to be: present, local, and alive.














8 PM – Midnight
Evening



### After-Dark Free-Form Call-Ins


No agenda, no script. The evening hours on Radio Free DeLand are pure open format — a free-form space where callers lead and the conversation follows wherever it needs to go. Music, debate, personal stories, or just the sound of someone who needed to be heard. The dial is yours. Pick up the phone.














The line is open around the clock — call in at any hour and become part of the broadcast.




















Why Listeners Keep Coming Back

## Always On.Always DeLand.


Whether it's 2 a.m. or high noon, Radio Free DeLand is live on the air — a real human voice waiting for yours. Night owls, radio enthusiasts, and neighbors have been tuning in for the same three reasons.













### Live Human Connection


No bots, no playlists, no automated voices. Every hour of Radio Free DeLand is a real person on the mic — ready to take your call, hear your story, and let you be part of the broadcast. It's the kind of radio that reminds you someone is always listening back.












### Rooted in Local Florida Culture


DeLand isn't just the broadcast address — it's the soul of the show. From Volusia County news to the rhythms of small-town Florida life, every segment carries the texture of this place. Tune in and hear your community reflected back at you, unfiltered and unapologetic.










### A Voice on the Air, Any Hour


3 a.m. insomnia. A long overnight drive. A quiet Sunday when the world feels far away. Radio Free DeLand is always there — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, with an open phone line and an open ear. You'll never reach a dead signal here.
























## A Living Slice of DeLand


Radio Free DeLand is more than a broadcast — it's a community gathering on the airwaves, 24 hours a day, seven days a week. Neon dusk skies, familiar voices, and the hum of local life make every hour on the dial feel like home.









On Air · 24/7
The studio never sleeps — and neither does DeLand.













### Call In. Be Heard.


Pick up the phone and join the conversation. Every caller becomes part of the story — no gatekeepers, no scripts, just real voices from across Central Florida and beyond.











### Rooted in DeLand


From Woodland Boulevard to the backroads of Volusia County, Radio Free DeLand carries the pulse of this community — its stories, debates, music, and late-night confessions.




























24/7 — DeLand, Florida



## Want to Join the Conversation?


Radio Free DeLand is on the air around the clock, and the line is always open. Whether you want to call in, share your story, or learn more about how to connect with the station, we’d love to hear from you. Real voices, real community — live.


Get in Touch

## The Story Behind DeLand&#39;s Boldest Broadcast — Radio Free DeLand

URL: https://radio-free-deland-a3895ef3.zappy5.app/about
Description: Discover how Radio Free DeLand became Central Florida&#39;s most open, community-driven radio / broadcasting platform — built for real people, real talk, and real connection 24/7.

The Story Behind DeLand's Boldest Broadcast — Radio Free DeLand






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Listen
- About



Contact















Broadcasting Live from DeLand, FL



# Radio That SoundsLike Your Neighborhood





Radio Free DeLand is a round-the-clock call-in radio show rooted in the rhythms, voices, and stories of Central Florida. We believe that broadcasting — real radio / broadcasting in its most human form — should feel spontaneous, immediate, and deeply local.


Whether it's two in the afternoon or two in the morning, someone is on the air and the lines are open. Our format is simple: tune in, pick up the phone, and become part of the conversation. No gatekeepers, no scripts — just DeLand talking to itself, one call at a time.


Shaped by the culture, characters, and unhurried pace of Florida living, Radio Free DeLand is a platform built for the community, by the community. We carry local voices the way the humid air carries sound at dusk — warm, close, and impossible to ignore.


Get in Touch


Listen Live











On air, every hour — DeLand, Florida






















Our Purpose

## Why We Broadcast


Radio Free DeLand exists because every voice deserves airtime. We keep the dial open around the clock — no gatekeepers, no dead air, no appointment required. Just DeLand, Florida, and whoever wants to talk.












### Open to Everyone,Every Hour


We run 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, because inspiration and conversation don't follow a schedule. Pick up the phone at 2 a.m. or 2 p.m. — the line is always live, the mic is always warm, and you are always welcome here.






### Real Voices,Real Conversation


This is community radio and broadcasting at its most human. No scripts, no spin — just neighbors talking to neighbors. We believe the best broadcasting happens when the audience becomes the show, and every caller shapes what comes next.






### Rooted inDeLand, Florida


We are proudly, stubbornly local. DeLand's character — its humidity, its quirks, its oak-lined streets and late-night diners — lives in every segment. We amplify what makes this corner of Florida distinct, and we keep it free.





















THE VOICES BEHIND THE DIAL



## People Who Keep the Lines Open


Radio Free DeLand runs on real voices — local people who show up at all hours, keep the conversation alive, and make sure there's always someone on the other end of the line. Meet the crew that shapes every broadcast.













Lead Host & Founder

### The Voice at Midnight


The anchor of every overnight shift, keeping conversation flowing from dusk to dawn. Whether it's a slow Tuesday or a packed Friday call-in, this is the presence that holds the frequency steady and makes every caller feel heard.



On Air Since 2019
DeLand, FL











Station Producer

### Behind Every Broadcast


The engine that keeps the show running on time and on tone. From cueing callers to shaping the nightly lineup, this producer weaves structure into spontaneity and ensures the signal never wavers — even at 3 a.m.



Production & Scheduling
DeLand, FL











Community Correspondent

### Out in the Neighborhood


This correspondent bridges the studio and the streets, bringing stories from DeLand's parks, diners, and front porches directly to the airwaves. The show's connection to local culture runs through every segment they file.



Field Reporting
Volusia County, FL











Overnight Call Screener

### Gatekeeper of the Night Line


Every caller who makes it to air passes through this steady hand first. Working the late hours when the calls get personal and the stories get real, this screener keeps the conversation honest, safe, and worth hearing.



Calls & Live Intake
10pm – 6am Shift










Want to be part of the broadcast? We're always looking for community voices.

Get in Touch



















Our Values


## What We Stand For


Radio Free DeLand isn't just a broadcast — it's a handshake with every person in Volusia County who ever wanted to be heard. These aren't corporate talking points. They're the reason we keep the mic open at 3 a.m.











01






### Open to Everyone, Always


The airwaves belong to the people. Whether you're calling in from a porch in Stetson Hills or a late-night diner on US-17, there's a seat at the table and a line kept open for you — twenty-four hours a day, seven days a week, no cover charge.






02






### Honest, Unfiltered Conversation


We don't script our guests or polish away the rough edges. Real talk from real neighbors is what makes radio worth listening to. We hold space for disagreement, nuance, and the kind of honesty you only get when the mic is live and nobody's performing.






03






### Rooted Right Here in DeLand


We're proud to broadcast from the Athens of Florida. Our stories come from these streets, these festivals, these moss-draped neighborhoods. Local voices aren't a feature — they're the whole point. We cover what the big stations skip, because this community deserves its own signal.



























## Join the Conversation — Any Hour, Any Night


Radio Free DeLand is on the air around the clock, and the line is always open. Whether you're a longtime listener, a curious newcomer, or a fellow night owl looking for real community radio and broadcasting in DeLand, Florida — we want to hear from you. Pick up the phone, drop us a message, and become part of the live show.



Get in Touch






Broadcasting live from the heart of DeLand — your 24/7 community voice on the dial.

Get In Touch

# Reach Out & Join the Conversation


Radio Free DeLand is always on — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Whether you want to call in live, share a local story, ask a question, or simply say hello, our lines and inbox are open. This station belongs to DeLand and everyone who calls it home.











## How to Find Us








Call In — Live & On Air

Lines open 24 hours a day, every day








Email the Studio

Stories, feedback, and general inquiries welcome

## Get in Touch with the Show


Have something on your mind? Want to share a story, leave a message for the crew, or find out how to call in live? We're always listening — day or night, rain or shine. Drop us a line and we'll get back to you between sets.











Your Name




Email Address

I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  and  Privacy Policy






Send Your Message

We typically respond within one broadcast cycle.





























Rooted in DeLand, Florida

## A Station Born From the Neighborhood


Radio Free DeLand isn't broadcasting from some distant studio tower — we're woven into the fabric of this city. DeLand is our signal source: its live oaks and brick-paved downtown, its Stetson students and longtime locals, its Friday-night energy and 3 a.m. quiet. Every hour of our 24/7 call-in show reflects the community that keeps us on the air.


- Located in the heart of DeLand, Florida — Volusia County's cultural crossroads, where small-city warmth meets a surprisingly vibrant arts and music scene.

- Broadcasting live around the clock — our signal reaches listeners across Volusia County, Central Florida, and anywhere a browser or radio can tune in.

- Open to every voice — our call-in lines are active 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, because community conversation doesn't keep office hours.

- Proudly independent — Radio Free DeLand is a community-driven broadcasting effort, shaped by local stories, local hosts, and local listeners.



Get in Touch With the Station









DeLand, FL








Station Base
DeLand, Florida



Format
24/7 Live Call-In



Coverage
Volusia County & Beyond















ON AIR ANSWERS

## Frequently Asked Questions


Everything you need to know about tuning in, calling in, and joining the conversation on Radio Free DeLand.






Q

### How do I get in touch with the show?




The easiest way to reach us is by phone — our call-in line is open around the clock, every day of the year. You can also send us a message through the contact form on this page, or reach out via our social channels. We read everything and love hearing from the community.





Q

### When is the show live?




Radio Free DeLand broadcasts live 24 hours a day, 7 days a week — no gaps, no reruns. Whether it's 2 in the afternoon or 3 in the morning, there's always a live host ready to take your call. That's the whole idea: community radio that never sleeps.





Q

### What kinds of calls fit the program?




We're wide open. Talk about what's on your mind — local DeLand news, Florida culture, personal stories, opinions, questions, or just a friendly chat. Our format is built around real voices from real people, so there's no wrong reason to call in. Keep it respectful and we'll keep the line open.





Q

### Can community members share local updates?




Absolutely — that's what we're here for. If you have a local event, a neighborhood update, a story worth telling, or news from your corner of Volusia County, call in and share it. Radio Free DeLand runs on community voices. Your update could be the one someone else needed to hear.





Q

### Do I need to be a radio professional to participate?




Not at all. Radio Free DeLand was built for everyday people, not polished broadcasters. First-time callers are always welcome. If you're nervous, don't be — our hosts will guide the conversation. All you need is something to say and a phone to say it from.





Q

### Where can I tune in from?




You can listen live through our website stream from anywhere in the world. Local listeners in the DeLand area can also catch us on the dial. Whether you're driving through Florida or streaming from across the country, Radio Free DeLand is always on and always accessible.









Broadcasting live from the heart of DeLand — your 24/7 community voice on the dial.
On Air 24/7

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://radio-free-deland-a3895ef3.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy

















From the Community

## Voices on the Line


Real listeners, real nights — what keeps DeLand tuned in around the clock.







# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/30/2026



Radio Free DeLand ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Radio Free DeLand

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://radio-free-deland-a3895ef3.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement

















From the Community

## Voices on the Line


Real listeners, real nights — what keeps DeLand tuned in around the clock.







# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 30, 2026



Radio Free DeLand is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Radio Free DeLand

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

From the Community

## Voices on the Line

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 30, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Radio Free DeLand

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Radio / Broadcasting provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Radio Free DeLand provides Radio / Broadcasting through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Radio Free DeLand. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information
